outlook.summary: Market in short gamma regime with extreme bearish positioning (PCR > 2.0 across all expiries). Dealers will sell into declines, accelerating downside moves. Key structural support at 630 resonance level. 0DTE max pain magnet at 645 provides near-term attraction.

levels.motivazione: Dominant put OI across ALL three expiries: 0DTE (25.5K), WEEKLY (144.7K - highest), MONTHLY (116.3K - highest). Ultimate structural support in negative GEX regime.
0DTE Max Pain level with high put OI (23.3K) and extreme volume (262K vol/OI ratio 11.3x). Natural attraction point for today's expiry.
Multi-expiry put wall with extreme 0DTE volume spike (559K vol / 19.6K OI = 28.5x ratio). Critical support below spot in negative GEX environment.
0DTE gamma flip zone where cumulative GEX changes sign. Critical equilibrium point - dealer hedging behavior inverts below this level.
Dominant call OI in monthly (20.5K - highest) and significant in 0DTE (17.4K). Major structural resistance capping upside.
Weekly max pain level above spot. Upside target for market makers in negative GEX environment. Bearish smirk skew validates resistance.
